---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe it clearly and concisely.

Example: *"I'm always frustrated when [...]"* or *"The current system doesn't allow me to [...]"*

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Be as specific as you can — include mockups, diagrams, or code snippets if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. Why is your proposed solution better or more appropriate?

- Alternative 1: [...]
- Alternative 2: [...]
- Why this approach: [...]

## Target Component

Which part of the project would this feature serve?

- [ ] UNBOUNDED - Platform core / AI orchestration
- [ ] UNBOUNDED - Site (portal, dashboard, landing page)
- [ ] UNBOUNDED - CLI / gateway
- [ ] UNBOUNDED - Documentation or community
- [ ] Termite Research - Biofuel project
- [ ] Termite Research - Natural Pest Control
- [ ] Termite Research - Termite Farming
- [ ] Cross-project infrastructure or tooling
- [ ] Governance, community, or process
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Impact

Who would benefit from this feature? (e.g., end users, contributors, researchers, developers)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here. Links to related discussions, issues, or external resources are welcome.

## Would You Be Willing to Help Implement This?

- [ ] Yes, I can work on this
- [ ] Yes, but I would need guidance or mentorship
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting the idea
- [ ] I can help test or review
